title: Robinhood Chain Goes Live on Mainnet with 24/7 Tokenized Stocks, Lighter Perps, and Planned AI Trading Agents
summary: Robinhood Chain, a Layer 2 blockchain built on Arbitrum's tech stack, has launched on mainnet. It offers 24/7 tokenized stocks, lighter perpetual contracts, and plans for AI-driven agentic trading, with Uniswap as a day-one partner.
body:
Robinhood Chain, a Layer 2 blockchain built using Arbitrum's technology stack, has officially gone live on public mainnet. The platform is designed to offer 24/7 trading of tokenized stocks and lighter perpetual contracts, making traditional financial instruments accessible around the clock.

The launch includes partnerships with major players like Uniswap, providing liquidity and trading options from day one. Robinhood Chain also plans to introduce crypto agentic trading in the future, aiming to automate and optimize trading strategies for users.

This development is significant for everyday investors as it democratizes access to traditional financial markets. By offering tokenized stocks and perpetual contracts on a blockchain, Robinhood Chain enables fractional ownership and trading without the constraints of traditional market hours.

For those interested in exploring this new platform, keep an eye on the upcoming AI-driven trading agents. These tools could revolutionize how users manage their portfolios, making trading more efficient and accessible. Watch for announcements on the integration of these agents and how they can be utilized to enhance your trading experience.
twitterThread: Robinhood Chain is live on mainnet, offering 24/7 trading of tokenized stocks and lighter perps. Uniswap joins as a day-one partner.
Built on Arbitrum's tech stack, this Layer 2 blockchain aims to democratize access to traditional financial instruments. Crypto agentic trading is planned for the future.

If you're into fractional ownership and round-the-clock trading, Robinhood Chain is worth a look. Watch for planned AI agents to take your trading to the next level. Read more → https://www.cryptocatalyst.news/articles/2026-07-02-robinhood-chain-launches-with-tokenized-stocks-and-247-trading
standaloneTweet: Robinhood Chain launches with 24/7 tokenized stocks and lighter perps. Uniswap is on board from day one. Time to trade without market hours!
